subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Divine Threshold! Perfume thy senses, at morn and eventide, with the sweet fragrance of the love of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده درگاه الهی در صبح و شام مشام را به رائحه طیبه محبت الله معطر نما
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @the Kingdom of God [Malakut], @light and darkness
